svg.text:
┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ ACTION RECOGNITION APPROACHES │ └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
2D CNN + LSTM: 3D CNN (C3D, I3D): ────────────── ─────────────────
Frame 1 → CNN → ┐ Video clip → 3D Conv layers → Action Frame 2 → CNN → ├→ LSTM → Action Frame 3 → CNN → ┘ Captures spatial-temporal features in single network Process frames independently, then aggregate
TWO-STREAM: TRANSFORMER-BASED: ─────────── ─────────────────
RGB stream → CNN ─┐ Frames → Patch embedding → ├→ Fusion → Action Temporal Transformer → Action Optical flow → CNN ─┘ (TimeSformer, VideoMAE) Separate appearance and motion
